description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.5 Docker image and defines global before_script steps to run apt-get update, install ruby-dev and ruby, install bundler via gem, install tox==2.3 via pip, execute bundle install with --path vendor --binstubs vendor/bin, and run make bootstrap. Set the variables AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID, AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, TWINE_USERNAME and TWINE_PASSWORD. Define two stages: test and publish. In the test stage add a feature job that runs make feature. In the publish stage add publish_binary and publish_pypi jobs, both restricted to the master branch, running make publish-binary and make publish-pypi respectively.
